Comment.value: Can be called from both IO List view (FAT Title) and FAT Page item
Will display all content items that are in contact with the IO - also media IOs and text variable usage
Can be called from both Title Settings and FAT Page item
Also work for IO concept and Legacy IO concept

0 + Count(FAT IO Value::PrimaryKey) + Count ( FAT List item @ IO::PrimaryKey ) + Count (FAT Score Category @ IO::PrimaryKey) + Count(FAT Page item @ IO Legacy::PrimaryKey) No need to check for patterncount in IO arrays to get a hit, since comma-separated IO Arrays are 1. Legacy and 2. Always corresponds to a Write IO. However - comma-separated IO arrays are included in search below Text variables are not included.

So the correct way to test for no related records is: - GTRR Match current record only: test for error 101 - GTRR Match found set: test for error 401
